action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "Good! I've successfully copied busybox and created symlinks for common utilities. Now I need to create the init script that will be the first process to run when the kernel boots, set up the passwd file for root login, and create essential device nodes.",
  "plan": "Next steps: 1) Create the /init script (the kernel looks for this as the first process), 2) Make it executable, 3) Set up /etc/passwd for passwordless root login, 4) Create essential device nodes in /dev (console, null, zero), 5) Package everything into initramfs.cpio.gz format.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > init << 'EOF'
#!/bin/sh

# Mount essential filesystems
mount -t proc none /proc
mount -t sysfs none /sys
mount -t devtmpfs none /dev

# Create console if it doesn't exist
mknod /dev/console c 5 1 2>/dev/null
mknod /dev/null c 1 3 2>/dev/null
mknod /dev/zero c 1 5 2>/dev/null

echo "Welcome to Custom Linux!"
echo "Kernel booted successfully"

# Start a shell
exec /bin/sh
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
